name: Robot Arm Energy Consumption Profiling
description: A manufacturing facility is conducting an energy audit of its robotic assembly cells. As a robotics engineer, profile the energy consumption of a robot arm across at least three distinct motion profiles using the ZMQ Remote API. Save per-timestep joint torques, velocities, and instantaneous power (|torque x velocity|) to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/energy_profile.csv. Save aggregate energy statistics to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/energy_report.json. Login: username=ga, password=password123.
